text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "Five rockets were fired at Nahariya, four of which were intercepted, and the rest hit open areas, per the IDF. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The IDF stated that some 10 rockets were fired toward Karmiel, eight of which were intercepted, and the "rest hit open areas." @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 15 rocket launches were conducted in the barrage targeting the Karmiel area. @wfwitness" Five rockets were fired at Nahariya, four of which were intercepted, and the rest hit open areas, per the IDF. @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 WSJ: The grandson of Raul Castro attempted to contact the White House through back channels by tapping a wealthy Havana businessman to pass along a letter last week, reportedly directly to U.S. President Trump. The letter was similar to an official one, even carrying the official Cuban seal, and proposed oppotunities for U.S. investment and economic agreements Cuba along with sanctions relief. The letter courier, Roberto Carlos Chamizo González, was stopped at Miami International Airport and the letter confiscated, ending the effort. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 《华尔街日报》：劳尔·卡斯特罗的孙子试图通过幕后渠道联系白宫，他上周指派了一名哈瓦那富商转交一封信，据报道是直接转交给美国总统特朗普。这封信看起来像是一封正式信函，甚至带有古巴官方印章，信中提议美国在古巴进行投资和达成经济协议，并要求解除制裁。信使罗伯托·卡洛斯·查米佐·冈萨雷斯在迈阿密国际机场被拦截，信件被没收，此次尝试随之告终。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah has called on residents not to return to targeted areas in southern Lebanon, the Bekaa and Beirut’s southern suburbs until the situation becomes fully clear following the ceasefire announcement. The group acknowledged the desire to return home and praised the people’s patience and steadfastness, but urged restraint out of concern for their safety. It promised that residents would return with heads held high, as always. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党呼吁居民在停火声明发布后，在局势完全明朗之前，不要返回黎巴嫩南部、贝卡谷地和贝鲁特南郊的目标区域。该组织承认人们渴望回家，并赞扬了民众的耐心和坚定，但出于安全考虑，敦促大家保持克制。它承诺，居民们将像往常一样昂首挺胸地回家。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧 U.S. Department of State: Israel shall preserve its right to take all necessary measures in self-defense, at any time, against PLANNED, IMMINENT*, or ongoing attacks. This shall not be impeded by the cessation of hostilities. Besides this, it will…" 🇮🇱 "We remain in Lebanon in a reinforced security zone... we are not leaving." - Netanyahu 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧 美国国务院：以色列应保留在任何时候针对已计划、迫在眉睫*或正在进行的袭击采取一切必要自卫措施的权利。这不应受到敌对行动停止的影响。除此之外，它将……” 🇮🇱 “我们仍留在黎巴嫩的一个强化安全区内……我们不会离开。” - 内塔尼亚胡 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 U.S. Department of State: Israel shall preserve its right to take all necessary measures in self-defense, at any time, against PLANNED, IMMINENT*, or ongoing attacks. This shall not be impeded by the cessation of hostilities. Besides this, it will not carry out any offensive military operations against Lebanese targets, including civilian, military, and other state targets, in the territory of Lebanon by land, air, and sea. The Government of Lebanon will take meaningful steps to prevent Hezbollah and all other rogue non-state armed groups in the territory of Lebanon from carrying out any attacks, operations, or hostile activities against Israeli targets. *This means there is no ceasefire and Israel can attack Lebanon because of vibes. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 美国国务院：以色列应保留在任何时候针对已计划、迫在眉睫*或正在进行的袭击采取一切必要自卫措施的权利。这不应受到敌对行动停止的影响。除此之外，它不会在黎巴嫩领土上通过陆、海、空对黎巴嫩目标（包括平民、军事和其他国家目标）进行任何进攻性军事行动。黎巴嫩政府将采取有意义的措施，防止真主党及黎巴嫩领土上的所有其他流氓非国家武装团体对以色列目标进行任何袭击、行动或敌对活动。*这意味着并没有真正的停火，以色列可以因为“感觉”而攻击黎巴嫩。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Reuters : The heads of the US Interior and Energy Departments are to hold a call with CEOs from energy companies, including Exxon and Chevron, to discuss their potential to boost oil and gas output, amidst rising global energy prices due to the Iran war. Global oil prices have spiked by about 4.6% to above $99 a barrel, with traders questioning whether peace talks between the US and Iran would resolve disruptions to Middle Eastern energy supplies caused by the war. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 路透社：美国内政部和能源部负责人将与包括埃克森美孚和雪佛龙在内的能源公司首席执行官举行电话会议，讨论在伊朗战争导致全球能源价格上涨的情况下，提高石油和天然气产量的潜力。全球油价已飙升约4.6%，突破每桶99美元，交易员们质疑美国与伊朗之间的和平谈判是否能解决战争导致的对中东能源供应的干扰。 @wfwitness

text: WarTranslated The 1st Corps of the National Guard of Ukraine "Azov" has declared drone control over Russian logistics near temporarily occupied Donetsk. Ukrainian UAVs are actively operating along routes near Zuhres, Andriivka, Starobesheve, Horlivka, Lysychansk, and the ring road; the success of their operations highlights the ineffectiveness of the Russian airspace control system. /1128083841/8228 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：乌克兰国民警卫队“亚速”第1军宣布，已控制了临时被占领的顿涅茨克附近的俄罗斯后勤补给线。乌克兰无人机在祖格雷斯（Zuhres）、安德里伊夫卡（Andriivka）、斯塔罗别舍韦（Starobesheve）、霍尔利夫卡（Horlivka）、利西昌斯克（Lysychansk）和环城公路附近的航线上积极活动；其行动的成功凸显了俄罗斯领空控制系统的无效性。 /1128083841/8228 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @OlgaNYC1211 : The Israelis are lying. Ukraine’s Foreign Ministry told reporters that Israeli authorities were warned about ship two weeks before it arrived in Haifa. - Savchenko Volodymyr tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @OlgaNYC1211：以色列人在撒谎。他们上个月就被告知这艘俄罗斯船只是俄罗斯影子船队的一部分，正在运输被盗的乌克兰谷物，但他们仍然允许它在4月12日停靠，并于昨天离开港口。令人作呕的是，他们竟然支持恐怖主义俄罗斯 🇮🇱 ❗️ 🇺🇦 以色列允许一艘载有被盗乌克兰谷物的俄罗斯船只航行，称扣押它“为时已晚” - Axios。以色列外交部长给安德烈·西比哈（Andriy Sybiha）发了短信，称该船已离开海法港，无法拦截。乌克兰外交部告诉记者，以色列当局在船只抵达海法前两周就收到了警告。 - Savchenko Volodymyr 推文

I mean, we have a very good relationship with Iran right now, as hard as it is to believe. And I think it's a combination of about 4 weeks of bombing and a very powerful blockade. The blockade is maybe more powerful than the bombing if you wanna know the truth. tweet

text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区无人机警报响起。@wfwitness” ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部上加利利地区卡尔米耶尔及其周边地区响起红色警报。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Discovery of a Significant Cache of Semi-Heavy Ammunition in Hoveyzeh 🔹 Hoveyzeh County Prosecutor: Through the intelligence monitoring by the IRGC Intelligence Organization of Khuzestan, 18 rockets and RPG charges were discovered in one of the areas of Hoveyzeh County. 🔹 Counter-revolutionary elements intended to transfer this shipment with the aim of creating insecurity in the region, but their plan was foiled thanks to the vigilance of the IRGC Intelligence Organization forces. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 在胡泽斯坦省霍韦泽发现大量半重型弹药 🔹 霍韦泽县检察官：通过胡泽斯坦省伊斯兰革命卫队情报组织的监控，在霍韦泽县某地区发现了18枚火箭弹和RPG弹药。🔹 反革命分子企图转移这批物资以在该地区制造动荡，但由于伊斯兰革命卫队情报组织部队的警惕，他们的计划被挫败。🚩 @RezistanceTrench1

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that he thinks the current negotiations are "Very successful" and that he is optimistic about the results: "I think we have a very successful negotiation going on right now, and I think it'll be if it if it happens…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that he himself would go to Islamabad if needed to "seal the deal:" Reporter: "Would you ever go to Pakistan to seal the deal yourself?" Trump: "I would. I would go to Pakistan. Yeah. Pakistan has been great. They've been so good. Islamabad, I'll be I might go." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，他认为目前的谈判‘非常成功’，并对结果持乐观态度：‘我认为我们现在进行的谈判非常成功，如果……如果它发生的话……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，如果有必要，他本人会前往伊斯兰堡以“达成协议”：记者：“您会亲自去巴基斯坦达成协议吗？”特朗普：“我会的。我会去巴基斯坦。是的。巴基斯坦一直很棒。他们一直很好。伊斯兰堡，我会……我可能会去。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区无人机警报响起。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that Iran has agreed to handover its uranium over: "Iran's agreed to that and they've agreed to it very powerfully. They've agreed to give us back the nuclear dust. It's way underground because of the attack we made…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that he thinks the current negotiations are "Very successful" and that he is optimistic about the results: "I think we have a very successful negotiation going on right now, and I think it'll be if it if it happens, it'll be announced fairly soon, and that'll give us free oil, free hornuz Strait. Everything will be nice. And I think your oil price will go down to lower than what it was before. And I think a lot of good things will happen." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，伊朗已同意交出其铀：‘伊朗已经同意了，而且他们同意得非常有力度。他们同意把核尘埃还给我们。因为我们发动的袭击，它现在在地下很深的地方……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，他认为目前的谈判“非常成功”，并对结果持乐观态度：“我认为我们现在进行的谈判非常成功，如果……如果它发生的话，很快就会宣布，这将给我们带来免费的石油、免费的霍尔木兹海峡。一切都会很好。我认为你们的油价会降到比以前更低。我认为很多好事将会发生。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that the conflict would reignite if there is no deal with Iran: Reporter: "If there's no deal, would you be willing to extend the ceasefire, or will the fighting resume, mister president?" Trump: "I would say the…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that Iran has agreed to handover its uranium over: "Iran's agreed to that and they've agreed to it very powerfully. They've agreed to give us back the nuclear dust. It's way underground because of the attack we made with the B-2 bombers." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，如果与伊朗没有达成协议，冲突将重新点燃：记者：‘如果没有达成协议，您是否愿意延长停火协议，还是战斗会恢复，总统先生？’特朗普：‘我会说……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，伊朗已同意交出其铀：‘伊朗已经同意了，而且他们同意得非常有力度。他们同意把核尘埃还给我们。因为我们用B-2轰炸机发动的袭击，它现在在地下很深的地方。’” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that the blockade on Iran is wonderful: "The blockade has been incredible. It's held. They're not doing any business. They're unable to do any business because of the blockade. And so, the combination of having…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that the conflict would reignite if there is no deal with Iran: Reporter: "If there's no deal, would you be willing to extend the ceasefire, or will the fighting resume, mister president?" Trump: "I would say the fighting if there's no deal, fighting resumes." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，对伊朗的封锁非常棒：‘封锁令人难以置信。它坚持住了。他们没有做任何生意。由于封锁，他们无法做任何生意。所以，结合……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，如果与伊朗没有达成协议，冲突将重新点燃：记者：‘如果没有达成协议，您是否愿意延长停火协议，还是战斗会恢复，总统先生？’特朗普：‘我会说，如果没有达成协议，战斗就会恢复。’” @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Trump: Iran has agreed to not have a nuclear weapon; they have agreed to it very powerfully. They have agreed to give us back the nuclear dust. We have a lot of agreement with Iran, and I think something is going to happen very positive. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 特朗普：伊朗已同意不拥有核武器；他们已经非常有力度地同意了这一点。他们同意把核尘埃还给我们。我们与伊朗达成了很多协议，我认为将会发生非常积极的事情。🚩 @RezistanceTrench1

text: Turkish President Erdogan: Israel, which openly expresses a plan to turn the West Bank into a new Gaza, is seeking to revive the shame of apartheid—32 years after its collapse in South Africa—through the death penalty it has imposed on Palestinian prisoners.
text_zh: 土耳其总统埃尔多安：以色列公开表达了将西岸变成另一个加沙的计划，这是在南非种族隔离制度崩溃32年后，通过对巴勒斯坦囚犯实施死刑，试图重演种族隔离的耻辱。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that they are looking into reports of the sudden deaths of U.S. scientists, with Trump "hoping" it was random, adding that they are looking at possible foreign interference: Well, I hope it's random, but we're going…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump stated that the blockade on Iran is wonderful: "The blockade has been incredible. It's held. They're not doing any business. They're unable to do any business because of the blockade. And so, the combination of having no navy, no air force, and no anti-aircraft equipment means they have nothing. Everything is gone, including their leaders. Now they have a new set of leaders, and we find them very reasonable." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，他们正在调查有关美国科学家突然死亡的报道，特朗普‘希望’这只是随机事件，并补充说他们正在调查是否存在外国干预：嗯，我希望这是随机的，但我们将会……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，对伊朗的封锁非常棒：“封锁令人难以置信。它奏效了。他们没有进行任何商业活动。由于封锁，他们无法进行任何商业活动。因此，没有海军、没有空军、没有防空装备，意味着他们一无所有。一切都消失了，包括他们的领导人。现在他们有了一批新的领导人，我们发现他们非常通情达理。” @wfwitness

text: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 ⚡️ A short while ago, the Commander of the Pakistan Army met with the President Masoud Pezeshkian. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1
text_zh: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 不久前，巴基斯坦陆军司令会见了马苏德·佩泽希齐扬总统。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench1

text: The SAHA 2026 Defense & Aerospace Exhibition, organized by Europe’s largest defense and aerospace cluster, SAHA, is about to begin. SAHA Chairman Haluk Bayraktar: In a time of rapidly evolving threats and shifting global power, #SAHA2026 brings together trust, collaboration, and advanced technology. We are uniting the global defense and aerospace community to build strategic partnerships and help shape the future of security. See you in Istanbul, May 5–9. 🌐 400,000 m² exhibition space 🌍 120+ countries 🏢 1,700+ companies 🤝 25,000+ B2B meetings 👥 200,000+ visitors 📍 Istanbul Expo Center (IFM)
text_zh: 由欧洲最大的国防和航空航天集群 SAHA 组织的 SAHA 2026 国防与航空航天展览会即将开始。SAHA 主席 Haluk Bayraktar：在威胁迅速演变和全球力量格局更迭的时代，#SAHA2026 汇聚了信任、协作和先进技术。我们正在团结全球国防和航空航天界，建立战略伙伴关系，并助力塑造安全未来。5月5日至9日，伊斯坦布尔见。 🌐 400,000 平方米展览空间 🌍 120+ 个国家 🏢 1,700+ 家公司 🤝 25,000+ 场 B2B 会议 👥 200,000+ 名参观者 📍 伊斯坦布尔博览中心 (IFM)

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 Multiple Israeli helicopters reported over the Quenitra and west Daraa Governorate by local sources. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 据当地消息来源称，在库奈特拉和达拉省西部上空发现了多架以色列直升机。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起无人机警报。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇱🇧 U.S. State Department published the full ceasefire agreement: The text of the following statement was agreed to by the Government of Israel and Government of Lebanon: Following productive direct talks on April 14 between the governments of the…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 The State Department released the full text of a ceasefire agreement between Israel and Lebanon, brokered after direct talks in Washington on 14 April. The truce, as announced by the State Department, begins on 16 April at 17:00 EST for an initial period of ten days, with possible extension by mutual agreement. Israel retains the right to take all necessary measures in self-defence against planned, imminent or ongoing attacks. Lebanon will take meaningful steps to prevent Hezbollah and other armed groups from carrying out attacks against Israeli targets. Lebanon’s security forces are recognised as having exclusive responsibility for the country’s sovereignty and national defence. The two countries will engage in good-faith direct negotiations, facilitated by the U.S., toward a lasting peace and security agreement. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇱🇧 美国国务院发布了完整的停火协议：以下声明文本已由以色列政府和黎巴嫩政府达成一致：继4月14日两国政府之间富有成效的直接会谈之后……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 美国国务院发布了以色列和黎巴嫩之间停火协议的全文，该协议是在4月14日于华盛顿进行直接会谈后促成的。正如国务院所宣布的那样，停火协议于美国东部时间4月16日17:00开始，初步期限为十天，经双方同意可延长。以色列保留针对计划中、迫在眉睫或正在进行的攻击采取一切必要自卫措施的权利。黎巴嫩将采取有意义的步骤，防止真主党和其他武装团体对以色列目标发动袭击。黎巴嫩安全部队被公认为对该国主权和国防负有排他性责任。两国将在美国的协助下，本着诚意进行直接谈判，以达成持久的和平与安全协议。 @wfwitness

text: U.S. Department of State: Israel shall preserve its right to take all necessary measures in self-defense, at any time, against planned, imminent, or ongoing attacks. Lebanon will take meaningful steps to prevent Hezbollah and other non-state armed groups in the territory of Lebanon from carrying out any attacks against Israeli targets.
text_zh: 美国国务院：以色列应保留在任何时候针对计划中、迫在眉睫或正在进行的攻击采取一切必要自卫措施的权利。黎巴嫩将采取有意义的步骤，防止真主党和黎巴嫩境内的其他非国家武装团体对以色列目标发动任何袭击。

text: Open Source Intel President Trump: The Lebanon ceasefire will include Hezbollah, I think Hezbollah will stick to the ceasefire. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044850089928077815/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普总统：黎巴嫩停火协议将包括真主党，我认为真主党会遵守停火协议。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044850089928077815/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 President Trump: I think we have a very successful negotiation going on right now. If it happens, it'll be announced fairly soon. That'll give us free oil, free Hormuz Strait. Everything will be nice. And I think your oil price will go down to lower than what it was before. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 特朗普总统：我认为我们目前正在进行非常成功的谈判。如果达成，很快就会宣布。这将给我们带来免费的石油、免费的霍尔木兹海峡。一切都会很好。而且我认为你们的油价会降到比以前更低的水平。推文

text: Netanyahu: I spoke with Trump… he is determined to continue the naval blockade and to dismantle Iran’s remaining nuclear capabilities. He believes he can remove this threat once and for all.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡：我与特朗普进行了交谈……他决心继续海上封锁并拆除伊朗剩余的核能力。他相信他可以一劳永逸地消除这一威胁。

text: Open Source Intel Lloyds List: “At least eight vessels have crossed the US blockade line and are heading for Iranian ports or to load Iranian cargo” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 劳埃德名单（Lloyds List）：“至少有八艘船只越过了美国封锁线，正驶向伊朗港口或准备装载伊朗货物” 推文
